name: Captain Hestrig Orlov

specials.name: Devastating Spellstrike
specials.description: The Dragonblood magi's sweeps are so wide and devastating, they splash onto nearby foes. Make a Spellstrike. Foes adjacent to the target take splash damage equal to 2 + the extra damage from Arcane Cascade. The damage type is the same as Arcane Cascade; if the spell already deals splash damage of the same type, combine the damage together before applying weaknesses or resistances.

specials.name: Spellstrike
specials.description: The Dragonblood Magi channels a spell into a melee Strike to deliver a magically charged attack. The Dragonblood Magi casts frostbite, gouging claw, or slashing gust. The effects of the spell don't occur immediately but are imbued into the Dragonblood Magi's attack instead. The Dragonblood Magi makes a melee Strike, which gains the arcane trait. The spell is coupled with the attack, using the Dragonblood Magi's attack roll to determine the effects of both the Strike and the spell. This counts as two attacks for their multiple attack penalty, but the penalty isn't applied until after the magus has completed the Spellstrike. After using Spellstrike, the Dragonblood Magi can't do so again until they recharge this ability as a single action, which has the concentrate trait. The Dragonblood Magi also recharges their Spellstrike when they cast thunderous strike.

items: +1 greatsword, backfire mantle, lesser energy breath potion (cold), moderate healing potion (2), scroll of runic weapon, key to chest in Q16, teleporter key (to Q15), 10 gp
spells: Eat Fire, Frostbite, Gouging Claw, Slashing Gust, Shield
